name: Thai Salmon Steaks in Panang Curry Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve the curry base in the chicken broth.
2. Bring to a boil and add white wine.
3. Simmer for several minutes.
4. Stir in coconut milk and return to a boil.
5. Simmer for several minutes until the sauce thickens slightly.
6. Serve the sauce over broiled salmon steaks.
